ogTitle: Cuthbert vs Daadenning Creek: Climate Safety

heading: Cuthbert vs Daadenning Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cuthbert, Western Australia and Daadenning Creek, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cuthbert has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Daadenning Creek (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cuthbert or Daadenning Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cuthbert has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Daadenning Creek scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cuthbert scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Daadenning Creek scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cuthbert or Daadenning Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cuthbert has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
